name: orchestrator-mcp
description: AI Orchestrator MCP server — recruits other MCP servers as "assets", tasks them against a case objective, and compiles their results into a report.

scripts.build:all:seq: npm run build && npm --prefix research-mcp run build && npm --prefix homebuyer-mcp run build && npm --prefix nestegg-mcp run build && npm --prefix lawguide-mcp run build && npm --prefix jobhunt-mcp run build && npm --prefix healthguide-mcp run build && npm --prefix polymath-mcp run build && npm --prefix overseer-mcp run build && npm --prefix curiosity-mcp run build && npm --prefix education-mcp run build && npm --prefix communication-mcp run build && npm --prefix sports-mcp run build && npm --prefix government-mcp run build && npm --prefix linguistics-mcp run build && npm --prefix faiths-mcp run build && npm --prefix loop-mcp run build && npm --prefix openai-mcp run build && npm --prefix aiforge-mcp run build && npm --prefix gitforge-mcp run build && npm --prefix promptcraft-mcp run build && npm --prefix apiforge-mcp run build && npm --prefix kalshi-mcp run build
scripts.check: npm run verify && npm run golden && npm run paraphrase && npm run caselog && npm run probe
